title: GoogleAnalyticsAdminV1betaDataSharingSettings
description: A resource message representing data sharing settings of a Google Analytics account.

name.description: Output only. Resource name. Format: accounts/{account}/dataSharingSettings Example: "accounts/1000/dataSharingSettings"

sharingWithGoogleAnySalesEnabled.description: Allows any of Google sales to access the data in order to suggest configuration changes to improve results.

sharingWithGoogleAssignedSalesEnabled.description: Allows Google sales teams that are assigned to the customer to access the data in order to suggest configuration changes to improve results. Sales team restrictions still apply when enabled.

sharingWithGoogleProductsEnabled.description: Allows Google to use the data to improve other Google products or services.

sharingWithGoogleSupportEnabled.description: Allows Google support to access the data in order to help troubleshoot issues.

sharingWithOthersEnabled.description: Allows Google to share the data anonymously in aggregate form with others.
